debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G : Graph α β
M : Set β
P : WList α β
hM : @Graph.IsMatching α β G M
h : @Graph.IsAugPath α β M G hM P
⊢ V(G, M) ⊆ V(G, symmDiff M P.edgeSet)

failed_attempts:
intro v hv
  simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, symmDiff, Set.mem_union, Set.mem_diff] at *
  by_contra! h'
  have hP := h.toIsAltPath
  have hfirst := h.first_not_in
  have hlast := h.last_not_in
  have hpath := h.toIsPath
  have hmatch := hP.mem_matching_iff'
  have hv' : v ∈ V(G, M) := hv
  have hv'' : v ∉ V(G, M ∆ E(P)) := h'
  simp_all [V_union, V_diff]

intro v hv
  simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, symmDiff, Set.mem_union, Set.mem_diff] at *
  by_contra! h'
  have h1 := h.first_not_in
  have h2 := h.last_not_in
  have h3 := h.toIsAltPath
  have h4 := h3.mem_matching_iff
  have h5 := P.edge_nodup_of_isTrail h3.toIsPath.toIsTrail
  have h6 := hM.subsingleton_inc v

intro v hv
  rw [Set.mem_iUnion, exists_prop]
  obtain ⟨e, heM, hev⟩ := hv
  use e
  simp only [symmDiff_mem, Set.mem_iUnion, exists_prop]
  refine Or.inl ⟨?_, hev⟩
  exact heM

intro v hv
  obtain ⟨e, he, hev⟩ := hv
  by_cases heM : e ∈ M
  · rw [symmDiff_mem] at hev
    right; exact ⟨e, Or.inl heM, hev⟩
  · rw [symmDiff_mem]
    left; exact ⟨e, Or.inr ⟨he, heM⟩, hev⟩
